understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete each level by moving the selectable pieces so that every goal tile marked '+' is occupied by a selectable piece at the same time, progressing through all levels until the game reports WIN.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each MOVE action shifts the currently selected piece one grid cell (3 pixels) in the chosen direction using the pixel-coordinate system shown in player.position/objects. Walls ('#') can block movement depending on their collision behavior, while blocks ('B') are pushable when adjacent in the movement direction (moving the selected piece can also move the block if space allows). If multiple selectable pieces exist, control switches via CLICK on the other piece’s exact pixel position. The movement.*_blocked flags are only adjacency hints and don’t guarantee the move will fail or succeed.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete each level by moving the selectable pieces so that every goal tile marked '+' is occupied by a selectable piece at the same time, progressing through all levels until the game reports WIN.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each MOVE action shifts the currently selected piece one grid cell (3 pixels) in the chosen direction using the pixel-coordinate system shown in player.position/objects. Walls ('#') can block movement depending on their collision behavior, while blocks ('B') are pushable when adjacent in the movement direction (moving the selected piece can also move the block if space allows). If multiple selectable pieces exist, control switches via CLICK on the other piece’s exact pixel position. The movement.*_blocked flags are only adjacency hints and don’t guarantee the move will fail or succeed.
